name: tv.tootie/overseerr-mcp
title: Overseerr MCP
description: MCP server for Overseerr media requests and discovery.

environmentVariables.name: OVERSEERR_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your Overseerr instance, e.g. https://overseerr.example.com.

environmentVariables.name: OVERSEERR_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Overseerr API key (Settings > General > API Key).
